architecture.summary: React workspace panels, reducer pattern, SSE streaming for activation

integrations.summary: Existing vskill API endpoints, SSE activation-test endpoint

ui-ux.summary: Grouped panel rail, activation panel layout, mode badges with color coding

performance.summary: No new perf concerns, existing SSE streaming pattern

security.summary: No new attack surface, dangerouslySetInnerHTML on server-fetched content only

edge-cases.summary: Empty prompts disabled, error state handling, loading states
